description: Create a stateful Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\db_labeler\ to fetch and label unreviewed incident reports from a local SQLite database at C:\workspace\data\incidents.db. The database contains a reports table with id, narrative, offense_type, and status columns. Implement a Talon Module (user.db_labeler) in labeler.py that maintains a CURRENT_REPORT_ID state. The module must include an action db_get_next() to fetch the first 'PENDING' report, store its ID, and insert its narrative, and an action db_label_record(offense: str) to update the stored record's offense_type, set its status to 'REVIEWED', and reset the state. Create labeler.talon in the same directory mapping the voice command "report fetch" to user.db_get_next() and the commands "tag assault", "tag burglary", "tag fraud", and "tag theft" to user.db_label_record() with the corresponding uppercase offense types.
